creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's only removed in head.  pc98 is still present in stable/11 which is still a supported branch, so remove it from the website and docs is quite premature.  ia64 was removed in 11 so is a bit older, but most of the existing references on the website document this clearly.

The bsdinstall-hardware page is definitely stale.  ia64 probably can be removed from that, but also arm, and aarch64 need to be added, maybe powerpc64, etc.
